storyBeat: 10 個太陽出現 — 大地會燒壞嗎?

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Tonight's story has a few new words. Let's learn them first!
questions.sentenceZh: 今晚的故事會用到幾個新字，我們先把它們學會！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：今晚要講后羿射日的故事，先來認識幾個關鍵字，記住了故事更好聽喔！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個字都在后羿射日的故事裡：
🔑 sun = 太陽
🔑 sky = 天空
🔑 hot = 熱
🔑 river = 河

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Four more words — can you match them all?
questions.explanationZh:
再來四個：
🔑 dry = 乾
🔑 field = 農田
🔑 grass = 草
🔑 burn = 燒

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one is the sun?
questions.question: Which one is the sun?
questions.explanationZh: sun = 太陽 ☀️！故事裡突然有十個太陽同時升起，把大地都烤焦了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which picture shows something dry?
questions.question: Which picture shows something dry?
questions.explanationZh: dry = 乾 🏜️！十個太陽一出現，河水都乾掉了、草都枯死了——大地就像沙漠一樣乾。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The river dried up in the hot sun.
questions.sentenceZh: 河在烈日下乾掉了。
questions.question: Which picture matches the sentence?
options: a wide river flowing under dark rain clouds
a dry cracked riverbed with no water
a small stream with fish jumping out
a frozen river covered in thick snow
optionsZh: 烏雲下寬廣的流動河流
questions.explanationZh: river = 河，dry = 乾。句子說河在烈日下乾掉了——圖中正好是一條乾裂、沒有水的河床。

storyBeat: 玉皇大帝給羿弓 — 他能擔下嗎?

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: A few more words to learn — then the story begins!
questions.sentenceZh: 再記幾個字，故事就要開始了！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：再學幾個重要的字，學會了，故事就更好懂囉！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese phrase to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個片語都出現在今晚的故事裡：
🔑 bow and arrow = 弓和箭
🔑 strong man = 強壯男人
🔑 shoot down = 射下來
🔑 hero = 英雄

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The archer held his bow and aimed at the sky.
questions.sentenceZh: 射手舉起弓，對準天空瞄準。
questions.question: Which picture matches 'an archer with a bow'?
options: a man swinging a long heavy sword
a man pulling back a bow to shoot
a man throwing a large round stone
a man holding a tall wooden shield
optionsZh: 一個男人拉弓準備射箭
一個男人拿著高大木盾
questions.explanationZh: archer = 射手，bow = 弓。射手就是拿著弓準備射箭的人！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which emoji shows a bow and arrow?
questions.question: Which emoji shows a bow and arrow?
questions.explanationZh: bow and arrow = 弓和箭 🏹！后羿就是用這個，把多餘的太陽一一射落。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi ___ nine suns from the sky.
questions.sentenceHard: Standing on the dry burning land, Hou Yi ___ nine suns from the sky one by one.
questions.question: Which word is correct?
questions.explanationZh:
這個句子說的是過去發生的事，shoot 的過去式是 shot（不規則動詞）。
完整句：Hou Yi shot nine suns from the sky.

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Let's review all the new words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
把這節的重點字再複習一遍：
🔑 bow = 弓
🔑 arrow = 箭
🔑 shoot = 射
🔑 hero = 英雄

storyBeat: 走遍大地 — 第一個太陽怎麼射?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的字，學起來！
🔑 walk = 走
🔑 field = 田
🔑 pull = 拉
🔑 breath = 呼吸
這幾個字，等一下你會聽到后羿怎麼準備射箭。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi walked across the dry brown land.
questions.explanationZh: 后羿一步一步走過乾枯褐黃的大地，腳底踩著龜裂的土。奶奶說，那條路，並不好走。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He saw burning fields. He saw empty rivers.
questions.question: What did Hou Yi see on the land?
questions.explanationZh: 他看見燒焦的田，看見空空的河床——這就是「熱造成的傷害」，每一眼都很心痛。
questions.sentenceZh: 他看見燒焦的田地，看見乾涸的河床。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He lifted his big red bow up to the sky.
questions.explanationZh: 他把大紅弓舉起來，對準炙熱的天空。奶奶說，就是這一刻，故事的緊張真正開始了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He pulled the string back slow. He did not rush.
questions.questionEn: Was Hou Yi careless and quick?
questions.explanationZh: 面對九個燃燒的太陽，后羿慢慢拉弦，沉住氣——最重要的箭，不能靠衝動。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他慢慢地拉弦，沒有急著放箭。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He took a deep breath. He held it still.
questions.explanationZh: 他深吸一口氣，屏住呼吸——奶奶說，每一個好射手，在最關鍵的那一刻，都會這樣做。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What kind of moment was this for Hou Yi?
questions.question: What kind of moment?
questions.explanationZh: 深呼吸、慢慢拉弦——這是全神貫注的樣子，「專注」就對了。
questions.sentenceZh: 這對后羿來說，是什麼樣的時刻？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He let one arrow fly into the bright sky.
questions.explanationZh: 他放開手，一支箭「咻——」地飛上了那燒亮的天空。奶奶說，那個聲音，聽起來一定很乾脆。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One sun fell down. The air felt a little cooler.
questions.question: What happened after the first arrow?
questions.explanationZh: 一個太陽「噗」地落下來，空氣稍微涼了一點——這就是「一個太陽下來了」。
questions.sentenceZh: 第一支箭射出去之後，發生了什麼事？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi looked at the sky. Eight suns more.
questions.explanationZh: 后羿看著天空，還有八個太陽。他沒有停下來，再次準備。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He lifted the bow again. He took another arrow...
questions.explanationZh: 他再次舉起弓，拿出另一支箭……奶奶說，這樣一個接一個，需要很大的力氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the action words from this part.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的動作詞，配對記起來：
🔑 lift up = 抬起
🔑 slowly = 慢慢
🔑 let go = 放開
🔑 wait = 等待

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi walked across the dry brown land.
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿一步一步走過乾枯褐黃的大地。
questions.question: What did the land look like when Hou Yi walked on it?
questions.explanationZh: 故事說他走過「乾枯褐黃的大地」——就是「乾枯褐黃 all over」的樣子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He saw burning fields. He saw empty rivers.
questions.sentenceZh: 他看見燒焦的田地，看見乾涸的河床。
questions.questionEn: Did Hou Yi see a land full of water and crops?
questions.explanationZh: 燒焦的田、乾枯的河床——后羿一步一步走過，那景象讓他更加堅定了手中的弓。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He pulled the string back slow. He did not rush.
questions.sentenceZh: 他慢慢地拉弦，沒有急著放箭。
questions.question: What does 'he did not rush' tell us about Hou Yi?
questions.explanationZh: 不慌不忙、慢慢拉弦——這說明后羿「沉著穩定」，不是倉促行事的人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He ___ a deep breath before he let the arrow fly.
questions.sentenceZh: 他在放箭之前，深深吸了一口氣。
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 這是「過去」發生的事——主詞是「He」，說過去做的動作要用過去式。take 的過去式是 took。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He let one arrow fly into the bright sky. What happened next?
questions.sentenceZh: 他放出一支箭，飛向那燒亮的天空——接下來發生了什麼？
questions.question: What happened right after?
questions.explanationZh: 故事說「一個太陽落下，空氣稍微涼了一點」——所以是「空氣變涼了一點」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He lifted the bow again. He took another arrow.
questions.sentenceZh: 他再次舉起弓，拿出另一支箭。
questions.questionEn: Did Hou Yi stop after the first shot?
questions.explanationZh: 第一個太陽落下，他又舉起弓——一箭一箭，沒有猶豫，這就是后羿的沉靜。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One sun fell down. The air felt a little cooler.
questions.sentenceZh: 第一個太陽落下來了，空氣感覺稍微涼了一點。
questions.question: What changed after the first sun fell?
options: there was a small drop in heat
questions.explanationZh: 「空氣稍微涼了一點」——不是全部都好了，只是「熱度稍微降了一點」，慢慢改善。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi walked over burning fields and empty rivers. How did he feel inside?
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿走過燒焦的田和乾涸的河——他心裡可能有什麼感覺？
questions.question: How might he feel inside?
questions.explanationZh: 看著這樣的傷害，他沒有逃跑、繼續舉弓——這就是「下定決心要幫忙」的樣子。

storyBeat: 九個太陽射下 — 剩 1 個會留嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚繼續學：
🔑 second = 第二
🔑 soon = 很快
🔑 gone = 不見
🔑 last = 最後
這幾個字，說的都是太陽一個個消失的過程。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi shot the second sun. Then the third.
questions.explanationZh: 第二個太陽射下去了，接著是第三個。后羿一直沒停下來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He shot more and more. One after another, they fell.
questions.question: How did Hou Yi shoot the suns?
questions.explanationZh: 一個接一個、穩穩地——這就是「一個接一個地射」，不慌不忙。
questions.sentenceZh: 他越射越多，一個接一個，全都落下來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The air grew cooler with every shot.
questions.explanationZh: 每射下一個太陽，空氣就涼一些——奶奶說，那種涼，像是大地慢慢透過氣來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A small green shoot pushed up through the dry earth.
questions.questionEn: Was the land starting to come back to life?
questions.explanationZh: 后羿每射落一個太陽，乾枯的土地就喘一口氣——那一小株綠芽，是大地說謝謝的方式。答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 乾硬的土裡，有一小株綠芽悄悄鑽出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Soon nine suns were gone from the sky.
questions.explanationZh: 很快，九個太陽都從天上消失了。只剩下最後一個。奶奶說，到這裡，后羿的手臂一定又酸又重。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Only one sun was left up there now.
questions.question: How many suns were in the sky now?
questions.explanationZh: 九個射下去，天上剩下「只有一個」——這是玉皇大帝的交代。
questions.sentenceZh: 現在天上還剩幾個太陽？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi lifted his bow one more time.
questions.explanationZh: 后羿再次舉起弓。奶奶說，他這次停了一下，看著最後那個太陽。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His arrow pointed up. His finger rested on the string.
questions.question: What was Hou Yi about to do?
questions.explanationZh: 箭對準了，手指放在弦上——他在準備「再射一次」，射那最後一個太陽。
questions.sentenceZh: 箭指向天空，手指搭在弦上。后羿要做什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What was this moment about?
questions.question: What was this moment about?
questions.explanationZh: 最後一個太陽，要不要射？后羿舉著弓，這是一個選擇的時刻——「一個選擇」。
questions.sentenceZh: 這一刻，是關於什麼的時刻？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at the last sun. Would he shoot? Or would he stop...
questions.explanationZh: 他看著最後一個太陽……射？還是停下來？奶奶說：「你覺得呢？」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the sequence words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的順序詞，配對記起來：
🔑 third = 第三
🔑 more and more = 越來越
🔑 each time = 每次
🔑 cool = 涼

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He shot more and more. One after another, they fell.
questions.sentenceZh: 他越射越多，一個接一個，全都落下來。
questions.question: How did Hou Yi shoot the extra suns?
questions.explanationZh: 「一個接一個，全都落下來」——就是「一個接一個地按順序」射。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The air grew cooler with every shot.
questions.sentenceZh: 每射下一個太陽，空氣就涼一些。
questions.questionEn: Did the air get warmer as Hou Yi kept shooting?
questions.explanationZh: 太陽一個個落下，大地的呼吸慢慢回來——每一箭，空氣都涼了一點點。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A small green shoot pushed up through the dry earth.
questions.sentenceZh: 乾硬的土裡，有一小株綠芽悄悄鑽出來。
questions.question: What did the green shoot tell us?
questions.explanationZh: 乾枯的土裡長出綠芽——大地開始甦醒，「生命慢慢回來了」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Soon nine suns were gone. How did the people feel?
questions.sentenceZh: 很快，九個太陽都消失了——人們心裡可能有什麼感覺？
questions.question: How did the people feel?
questions.explanationZh: 九個太陽消失、空氣變涼——人們看到大地慢慢回來，一定「終於看到希望」了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Only one sun was left up there now.
questions.sentenceZh: 現在天上還剩下一個太陽。
questions.questionEn: Had Hou Yi shot down all ten suns by this point?
questions.explanationZh: 九個射落，最後還有一個在天上等著后羿的決定——他放下了弓，留下了那道光。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His arrow pointed up. His finger rested on the string.
questions.sentenceZh: 箭指向天空，手指搭在弦上。
questions.question: What was Hou Yi doing at this moment?
questions.explanationZh: 箭朝上、手指在弦上——他「在瞄準準備射」那最後一個太陽，時機到了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi looked at the last sun. Should he shoot it too?
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿看著最後那個太陽——他也要射它嗎？
questions.question: What kind of moment was this?
questions.explanationZh: 射還是不射最後一個？這不是慶祝，不是休息——這是「一個重要決定」的時刻。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi shot the second sun. Then the third.
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿射下了第二個太陽，接著是第三個。
questions.questionEn: Did Hou Yi give up after the second shot?
questions.explanationZh: 第二個射落，接著第三個——后羿的弓沒有放下，沉靜地一直射下去。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He shot one by one.
accept: He shot them one by one.
He shot them one after another.
questions.explanationZh: one by one = 一個接一個。后羿沉著地，把太陽一個接一個射落。
questions.sentenceZh: 他一個接一個地射。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The air grew cooler with every shot.
questions.answer: The air grew cooler with every shot.
accept: The air got cooler with every shot.
The air became cooler with each shot.
With every shot, the air grew cooler.
With each shot, the air got cooler.
questions.explanationZh: grew cooler = 變得更涼。每次箭飛出去，大地就多喘一口氣，空氣就涼了一點。
questions.sentenceZh: 每射一次，空氣就涼一些。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He let the last sun stay in the sky.
questions.answer: He let the last sun stay in the sky.
accept: He allowed the last sun to stay in the sky.
He left the last sun in the sky.
He kept the last sun up in the sky.
questions.explanationZh: let … stay = 讓……留下。后羿放下弓，選擇了留下那個太陽——因為大地需要它的光。
questions.sentenceZh: 他讓最後那個太陽留在天空。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Nine suns were gone. Hou Yi lifted his bow at the last one. Then he put it down.
questions.sentenceZh: 九個太陽消失了。后羿把弓對準最後那個，然後放下了。
questions.question: What does putting down the bow tell us about Hou Yi?
options: He forgot how to aim at the final sun.
He chose to think of others, not just finish the task.
He was sure the last sun would fall on its own.
He wanted the Emperor to take the last shot.
optionsZh: 他忘了怎麼對準最後那個太陽。
他選擇為別人著想，而不是只想完成任務。
他以為最後一個太陽會自己落下。
他想讓玉皇大帝來射最後一箭。
questions.explanationZh: 后羿停手，是因為他想到人們需要光和溫暖——這不只是「完成任務」，而是真正替別人著想。這才是英雄最難的選擇。

storyBeat: 留下最後太陽 — 玉皇大帝看見嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
最後幾個字，記好：
🔑 put down = 放下
🔑 stay = 留下
🔑 light = 光
🔑 green = 綠
待會你就知道，「留下一個太陽」帶來了什麼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi did not shoot the last sun.
questions.explanationZh: 后羿沒有射最後那個太陽。他停下來了。奶奶說，這個選擇，才是真正厲害的地方。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He thought of cold nights with no light at all.
questions.question: Why did he stop shooting?
questions.explanationZh: 他想到沒有光的冰冷長夜——人們需要那個太陽，所以他「需要留一個」，不能全射光。
questions.sentenceZh: 他想著沒有光的冷冷長夜，停下手來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He put the big red bow down on the ground.
questions.explanationZh: 后羿把大紅弓放到地上。奶奶說，那個放下的聲音，一定很沉。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He let the last sun stay up in the sky.
questions.questionEn: Did Hou Yi want all suns gone?
questions.explanationZh: 后羿放下了弓，讓最後那個太陽留在天上——大地需要光，他清楚地知道。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他讓最後那個太陽，繼續留在天空裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The people came out of their homes again.
questions.explanationZh: 人們從家裡走出來了——終於可以出門了！奶奶說，那個早晨，大家一定很不敢相信。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They saw warm light, not burning light.
questions.question: How did the sun feel now?
questions.explanationZh: 不再是灼人的烈日，而是暖暖的、溫柔的光——「又暖又溫柔」，這樣的太陽，才是真正的好太陽。
questions.sentenceZh: 大家看到的，是溫暖的光，不是燒人的光。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The rivers ran again. The grass turned green.
questions.explanationZh: 河水開始流動，草慢慢變回綠色——奶奶說，大地真的活過來了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the land look now?
questions.question: How did the land look?
questions.explanationZh: 河水流了，草變綠了——大地就是「活又翠綠」的樣子，生機回來了！
questions.sentenceZh: 現在的大地，看起來是什麼樣子？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The children laughed by the river again.
questions.explanationZh: 孩子們又在河邊笑了！奶奶說，那個笑聲，應該是全故事裡最好聽的聲音。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The Jade Emperor in the sky watched it all...
questions.explanationZh: 玉皇大帝在天上，看著這一切……奶奶說，他心裡在想什麼，我們等一下就知道了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words about what happened after.
questions.explanationZh:
故事結尾的 4 個關鍵字：
🔑 come back = 回來
🔑 again = 再次
🔑 laughter = 笑聲
🔑 hope = 希望

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi did not shoot the last sun.
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿沒有射最後那個太陽。
questions.question: Why did Hou Yi stop before the last sun?
options: his arm could not lift anymore
the Emperor told him to stop
he knew the world needed warmth
questions.explanationZh: 他想到「沒有光的冷夜」——人們需要那個太陽，所以他「知道世界需要溫暖」，選擇不射。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He thought of cold nights with no light at all.
questions.sentenceZh: 他想著沒有光的冷冷長夜。
questions.questionEn: Was Hou Yi thinking about what the people needed?
questions.explanationZh: 他想到「沒有光的冷夜」——這就是在替人們著想，答案是 Yes，他想到了人們的需要。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The rivers ran again. The grass turned green.
questions.sentenceZh: 河水開始流動，草慢慢變回綠色。
questions.question: What happened to the land after one sun stayed?
options: it turned too cold for plants
questions.explanationZh: 河再次流動、草變回綠色——「水跟生命慢慢回來了」，大地真的活過來了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The children ___ by the river again.
questions.sentenceZh: 孩子們又在河邊笑了。
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 這是過去發生的故事，主詞是「The children（孩子們）」，說的是過去的動作，要用過去式 laughed。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The people came out of their homes again. How did they feel?
questions.sentenceZh: 人們從家裡走出來了——他們心裡是什麼感覺？
questions.question: How did they feel?
questions.explanationZh: 終於可以出門、看見暖暖的太陽——當然是「鬆了一口氣又很開心」啊！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They saw warm light, not burning light.
questions.sentenceZh: 大家看到的，是溫暖的光，不是燒人的光。
questions.questionEn: Was the remaining sun harmful and too hot?
questions.explanationZh: 后羿留下的那個太陽，帶來的是暖，不是傷——這才是大地真正需要的光。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The people came out of their homes again.
questions.sentenceZh: 人們從家裡走出來了。
questions.question: What does this tell us about life after Hou Yi's act?
options: it was now cold and dark
questions.explanationZh: 人們走出來了——他們不再躲在家裡，表示「事情慢慢回到正常」了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi put his bow down. The land was green again. What word describes this ending?
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿放下弓，大地重新變綠——這個結局，用哪個字最好？
questions.question: What word fits the ending?
questions.explanationZh: 大地活過來、孩子笑了——這個結局是「充滿希望」的，不是悲傷也不是恐怖。

storyBeat: 王不再讓羿做神 — 羿會怎麼回應?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
再學 4 個字！
🔑 happy = 開心
🔑 own = 自己的
🔑 god = 神
🔑 give up = 放棄
這幾個字，說的是后羿接下來要失去什麼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The Jade Emperor was not happy with Hou Yi.
questions.explanationZh: 玉皇大帝對后羿不滿意。奶奶說，這句話說出來，讓人很意外——明明是后羿救了大地啊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The nine fallen suns were his own children.
questions.question: Why was the Jade Emperor upset?
questions.explanationZh: 那九個被射下來的太陽，是玉皇大帝自己的孩子——他失去了孩子，當然傷心又生氣，所以是「太陽是他的家人」。
questions.sentenceZh: 那九個被射落的太陽，是玉皇大帝自己的孩子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "You cannot be a god any more," the Emperor said.
questions.explanationZh: 「你不能再做神了，」玉皇大帝說。奶奶說，這句話說出來，后羿大概很久沒有說話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi saved the land. The Emperor still took his place away.
questions.questionEn: Did doing the right thing protect Hou Yi from loss?
questions.explanationZh: 后羿射落了九個太陽，救了整片大地，卻換來失去神位——做了對的事，有時要付出很重的代價。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿救了大地，玉皇大帝還是把他的神位拿走了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi gave up his place in the sky.
questions.explanationZh: 后羿放棄了他在天上的位置。奶奶說，他放下了，沒有反抗，默默接受了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He became a normal man on the green earth.
questions.question: What did Hou Yi become?
questions.explanationZh: 他成了地上的普通人，就跟我們大家一樣——不是神了，就是「一個普通人」。
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿變成了什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His wife Chang'e became a normal woman too.
questions.explanationZh: 他的太太嫦娥，也跟著成了普通人。兩個人，從天上來到地上，重新開始。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How might Hou Yi feel about this change?
questions.question: How might Hou Yi feel?
questions.explanationZh: 放棄了但沒有鬧、沒有哭——他安靜地接受了，所以是「安靜接受」。
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿對這個改變，心裡可能是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They went to live on the earth together.
questions.explanationZh: 他們一起走到地上生活。奶奶說，從神變成凡人，要重新學的事情，真的很多。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sky was no longer home. The earth was new...
questions.explanationZh: 天空不再是家，大地是新的開始……奶奶說，接下來的故事，就是嫦娥自己的故事了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the emotion words from this part.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的情感詞，配對記起來：
🔑 sad = 傷心
🔑 lose = 失去
🔑 angry = 憤怒
🔑 accept = 接受

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The Jade Emperor was not happy with Hou Yi.
questions.sentenceZh: 玉皇大帝對后羿不滿意。
questions.question: Why was the Jade Emperor unhappy?
options: the shot suns were his sons
optionsZh: 被射的太陽是他的兒子
questions.explanationZh: 「那九個被射下來的太陽，是玉皇大帝自己的孩子」——他失去了兒子，當然不開心。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "You cannot be a god any more," the Emperor said.
questions.sentenceZh: 「你不能再做神了，」玉皇大帝說。
questions.questionEn: Did the Emperor reward Hou Yi with more power?
questions.explanationZh: 那句「你不能再做神了」，是懲罰，不是感謝——玉皇大帝失去了孩子，心裡的傷比誰都深。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi saved the land. The Emperor still took his place away.
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿救了大地，玉皇大帝還是把他的神位拿走了。
questions.question: What is surprising about the Emperor's choice?
options: he gave Hou Yi a bigger bow
someone who helped lost their rank
the people ran away in fear
optionsZh: 幫了忙的人失去了地位
questions.explanationZh: 明明救了大地，卻還是失去神位——「幫了忙的人失去了地位」，這讓人意外。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He became a normal man on the green earth.
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿成了地上的普通人。
questions.question: What kind of life did Hou Yi now have?
options: 🎪 a life of shows and fame
questions.explanationZh: 他成了地上的「普通人」——不是神，就是凡人的日子，平平淡淡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi gave up his place in the sky.
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿放棄了他在天上的位置。
questions.questionEn: Did Hou Yi fight hard to stay a god?
questions.explanationZh: 他「放棄了」——默默接受，沒有抗爭，所以答案是 No，他沒有奮力反抗。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His wife Chang'e became a normal woman too.
questions.sentenceZh: 他的太太嫦娥，也跟著成了普通人。
questions.question: What happened to Chang'e because of the Emperor's decision?
optionsZh: 她也失去了神仙的生活
questions.explanationZh: 嫦娥「也跟著成了普通人」——因為玉皇大帝的決定，她「也失去了神仙的生活」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sky was no longer their home. How did this ending feel?
questions.sentenceZh: 天空不再是他們的家——這樣的結局是什麼感覺？
questions.question: How did this ending feel?
questions.explanationZh: 救了大地卻失去神位——這不是快樂的結局，是「甜中帶苦、安靜」，讓人心疼但也平靜。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They went to live on the earth together.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們一起走到地上生活。
questions.questionEn: Did Hou Yi and Chang'e face this new life alone?
questions.explanationZh: 從天上到地上，失去了神位，卻還有彼此——「一起」這兩個字，是后羿和嫦娥最後的依靠。答 No。

storyBeat: 凡人羿與凡人嫦娥 — 接下來是嫦娥的故事

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
最後這組字，記住：
🔑 old = 老
🔑 free = 自由
🔑 wall = 牆
🔑 story = 故事
「自由」這個字，是今晚最重要的感受——做凡人，其實也有凡人的自由。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi and Chang'e walked the green earth as people.
questions.explanationZh: 后羿和嫦娥像普通人一樣，走在綠色的大地上——腳踩著真實的泥土，感覺一定很不一樣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They grew old like all people grow old.
questions.question: How did Hou Yi and Chang'e age?
questions.explanationZh: 他們慢慢老去，就跟所有的人一樣——「像一般人那樣」老去，沒有什麼不同。
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿和嫦娥是怎麼老去的？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They were not gods, but they were free.
questions.explanationZh: 他們不是神了，但他們是自由的——不用再聽天上的命令，這也是一種幸福。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: No one in the sky told them what to do now.
questions.questionEn: Did they still take orders from above?
questions.explanationZh: 射下了九個太陽之後，天上的命令再也傳不到他們了——凡人的日子，是他們自己的。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 天上再也沒有人告訴他們該怎麼做了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi kept his big red bow on the wall.
questions.explanationZh: 后羿把那把大紅弓掛在牆上。奶奶說，他沒有丟掉它，那把弓，是他的記憶。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at it some nights in the soft lamp light.
questions.question: Why did Hou Yi keep the bow?
questions.explanationZh: 夜裡，他有時就坐在那裡，靜靜地看著它——那把弓是他的「安靜的回憶」。
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿為什麼把弓留在牆上？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at the one warm sun every morning.
questions.explanationZh: 每天早上，他看著那一個暖暖的太陽升起——那個太陽，是他留下來的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did Hou Yi feel about the one sun?
questions.question: How did he feel about the sun?
questions.explanationZh: 他留下的決定，救了大地——每天看到那個太陽，心裡一定「開心當初留下了」。
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿看著那個太陽，心裡是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Chang'e walked beside him through every season.
questions.explanationZh: 每一個季節，嫦娥都在他身邊。春夏秋冬，一起走過。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What came next was Chang'e's story. The moon was waiting...
questions.explanationZh: 接下來，是嫦娥自己的故事。月亮在等著她……奶奶說，下一個故事，會讓你更心疼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match these words about a new life.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚結尾的 4 個字，配對記起來：
🔑 season = 季節
🔑 every day = 每天
🔑 memory = 回憶
🔑 calm = 平靜

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They were not gods, but they were free.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們不是神了，但他們是自由的。
questions.question: What did Hou Yi and Chang'e gain by living on earth?
questions.explanationZh: 不是神，但是「自由的」——他們得到的是「從天上規則得到自由」，不用再聽命於天。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: No one in the sky told them what to do now.
questions.sentenceZh: 天上再也沒有人告訴他們該怎麼做了。
questions.questionEn: Did Hou Yi still obey the Jade Emperor's orders?
questions.explanationZh: 天上的命令再也傳不到他們了——后羿曾為天下射箭，如今只為自己和嫦娥而活。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi kept his big red bow on the wall.
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿把那把大紅弓掛在牆上。
questions.question: Why might Hou Yi keep the bow on the wall?
options: to sell for gold one day
as a reminder of his past
questions.explanationZh: 他沒有丟掉它——那把弓是他曾經的任務與身份，掛在牆上「當作過去的記憶」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at it some nights in the soft lamp light.
questions.sentenceZh: 夜裡，他有時就靜靜地看著它，在柔和的燈光下。
questions.question: What kind of nights were these for Hou Yi?
questions.explanationZh: 柔和燈光下靜靜看著舊弓——這樣的夜晚是「安靜且充滿思緒」，在回憶著過去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Chang'e walked beside him through every season.
questions.sentenceZh: 每一個季節，嫦娥都在他身邊。
questions.questionEn: Was Chang'e with Hou Yi only in the summer?
questions.explanationZh: 春夏秋冬，嫦娥都在后羿身邊——射日的壯烈已過，留下的是這份安靜的陪伴。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at the one warm sun every morning.
questions.sentenceZh: 每天早上，他看著那一個暖暖的太陽升起。
questions.question: Why did Hou Yi look at the sun each morning?
questions.explanationZh: 那個太陽是他「選擇留下來的」——每天看著它，提醒自己當初的那個決定。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What came next was Chang'e's story. The moon was waiting.
questions.sentenceZh: 接下來，是嫦娥自己的故事。月亮在等著她……
questions.question: Where does the next story go?
questions.explanationZh: 「月亮在等著她」——嫦娥的故事，要飛向「月亮」了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They grew old like all people grow old.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們慢慢老去，就跟所有的人一樣。
questions.questionEn: Did Hou Yi and Chang'e stay young forever as gods might?
questions.explanationZh: 曾經射落九個太陽的人，也慢慢白了頭——他們像所有人一樣老去，平靜而真實。答 No。
